allow: Bash(node -e "const Database = require\('better-sqlite3'\); const db = new Database\('leme-crm.db'\); const count = db.prepare\('SELECT COUNT\(*\) as n FROM leads'\).get\(\); console.log\('Leads atuais:', count.n\);")

Bash(python -c "import sqlite3; conn = sqlite3.connect\('server/leme-crm.db'\); cur = conn.cursor\(\); cur.execute\('SELECT COUNT\(*\) FROM leads'\); print\('Leads:', cur.fetchone\(\)[0]\); conn.close\(\)")
